theta.description: Tier 0.5 property-oracle theta generated from scripts/theta_genome.py. Circle approach with Method-A groundtruth-triggered controller handoff.

switching.reachability: trigger window is cross-constrained to the selected circle approach

excluded.c_tier_setpoint_amplitude_attack: excluded by design; step axis is moderate P5 settling stimulus only
excluded.motor_or_sensor_faults: deferred to Gazebo route after SIH support boundary is verified
